authenticationType.description: Which authentication mechanism the datasource uses to talk to Google APIs.

clientEmail.description: Service account email address for JWT authentication.

defaultProject.description: GCP project ID. In JWT mode, auto-filled from the service account JSON.

defaultSheetID.description: Optional spreadsheet ID to use as default when creating new queries.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to a local private key file on the Grafana server. Not supported in hosted environments.

secureValues.description: Service account private key for JWT authentication.
Google API key. Spreadsheets must be publicly shared.
